prompts.name: Warm Palette
prompts.text: Use a warm color palette built around amber, soft orange, warm red, and golden tones while preserving natural balance.

prompts.name: Cool Palette
prompts.text: Use a cool color palette built around blue, teal, silver, and soft violet tones with clean visual harmony.

prompts.name: Pastel Palette
prompts.text: Use a pastel color palette with soft pinks, gentle blues, creamy yellows, and low saturation for a delicate look.

prompts.name: Vibrant Palette
prompts.text: Use vibrant colors with strong saturation, clean contrast, and lively visual energy without making the image harsh.

prompts.name: Muted Palette
prompts.text: Use muted colors with controlled saturation, subtle contrast, and a refined cinematic feel.

prompts.name: Earth Tones
prompts.text: Use natural earth tones such as warm browns, olive greens, clay reds, sand, and soft beige.

prompts.name: Monochrome
prompts.text: Use a refined monochrome palette with careful tonal separation, clean contrast, and elegant simplicity.

prompts.name: Black and Gold
prompts.text: Use a black and gold palette with luxurious contrast, warm metallic accents, and dramatic elegance.

prompts.name: White and Silver
prompts.text: Use a white and silver palette with clean brightness, cool metallic accents, and refined minimalism.

prompts.name: Red and Black
prompts.text: Use a red and black palette with dramatic contrast, bold styling, and controlled intensity.

prompts.name: Blue and White
prompts.text: Use a blue and white palette with fresh clarity, cool atmosphere, and clean visual balance.

prompts.name: Neon Palette
prompts.text: Use neon colors with glowing accents, saturated highlights, and stylish futuristic contrast.

prompts.name: Soft Gradient
prompts.text: Use soft gradient color transitions that blend smoothly across the scene and support a polished visual mood.

prompts.name: Cinematic Grade
prompts.text: Apply a cinematic color grade with balanced contrast, controlled saturation, and cohesive mood.

prompts.name: Natural Colors
prompts.text: Use natural color rendering with believable skin tones, realistic material color, and balanced white balance.
